title: premna suavis
intro: Premna suavis, also known as the fragrant Premna or sweet Premna, is a tropical flowering plant native to India and Southeast Asia. The plant's leaves and stems are used in traditional medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. Premna suavis has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
